The FAILS logos and icons were designed by chadkills, ordered by Marten Richter on the Fiverr platform.
Other images in the brand folder were generated using recreate.ai based on the original brand style with a paid basic subscription,
using a combination of different models, including but not limited to recreate's own models and Google's nanobanana pro.

The logo and brand-related files are not covered by AGPL as the other parts of FAILS.
You can use them for a standard install of FAILS, but for a fork, you have to create your own logo
 and brand-related pictures.
